corrections.text: In the 'Cost and competitive context' section, the article attributes the quoted passage 'refers to raw material cost per unit of stored energy, not the installed system cost, which also includes membranes, pumps, and power electronics' directly to CleanTechnica. The wording is verbatim in CleanTechnica's piece, but in CleanTechnica the passage is itself a quotation of News 18 — CleanTechnica is the secondary source that cites News 18 for this framing. A more precise attribution would read 'CleanTechnica, quoting News 18, cautions that…'. The substance of the caveat (the 80x figure refers to raw materials per kWh, not installed-system cost) is accurate; only the chain of attribution is one step removed from the original outlet.
